Bayesian SIR Model Analysis

Adapted from the Stan Boarding School Case Study
Generated on 2026-05-13 20:31

1. Data Exploration

The dataset contains 52 weeks of weekly case counts (Jan 06, 2025 to Dec 29, 2025). Total observed cases: 833. Peak at week 30 with 69 cases.

Number of weeks : 52
Date range      : 2025-01-06 to 2025-12-29
Total cases     : 833
Peak week       : 30  (69 cases)
Mean weekly     : 16.0
Std weekly      : 21.4
Missing values  : 0

2. SIR Model Formulation

Standard SIR compartmental model solved via 4th-order Runge-Kutta:

dS/dt = -beta * S * I / N
dI/dt =  beta * S * I / N  -  gamma * I
dR/dt =  gamma * I

N = 1500,   S(0) = 1499,  I(0) = 1,  R(0) = 0
Conservation check passed: max|S+I+R - N| = 1.36e-12

3. Prior Predictive Simulation

Priors:

  • β ~ Normal(0.5, 0.2) truncated to positive
  • γ ~ Normal(0.15, 0.05) truncated to positive
  • φ ~ Exponential(5) (negative-binomial overdispersion)

200 simulated epidemics from the prior bracket the observed data, confirming that the priors are weakly informative and reasonable.

4. Bayesian Inference (MCMC)

Metropolis-Hastings with adaptive proposals during warmup. Parameters sampled in log-space for positivity.

  • Likelihood: NegBin(casest | μ = It, φ), var = μ + μ2/φ
  • 4 chains × (2500 warmup + 2500 sampling) = 10000 posterior draws

Acceptance rates: 0.180, 0.197, 0.128, 0.170

5. MCMC Diagnostics

Convergence

      beta:  R-hat = 1.0091,  ESS = 212
     gamma:  R-hat = 1.0037,  ESS = 254
       phi:  R-hat = 1.0224,  ESS = 299
R-hat values near 1.0 indicate convergence.

Posterior Summary

ParameterMeanSD2.5%25%50%75%97.5%
beta0.48310.18390.21740.32770.40550.69280.7607
gamma0.26450.07390.11350.20920.26690.32240.3937
phi0.54450.10320.36960.46900.53730.60460.7763

6. Posterior Predictive Checks

200 posterior draws used. Median prediction with 50%/90% credible intervals.

7. R0 Estimation

R0 = β / γ

  R0 mean   = 1.812
  R0 median = 1.656
  R0 95% CI = [1.386, 2.925]
R0 > 1 as expected for an observed epidemic.

8. Model Fit Assessment

Mean residual: -15.33
Std residual: 32.15
Max |residual|: 73.80
Some systematic bias detected; the model may need refinement.

Total compute time: 19.6 seconds.
